name: titan_incarnation_summary
primary_question: What active and gate-locked Titan partition is shared by the exact committed aoa-agents roster examples and aoa-sdk session-receipt example without treating them as current incarnations?
derivation_rule: validate identical Titan names, active or locked state, and gate assignments across all three owner examples before deriving the bounded reference counts
authority_ceiling: Weaker than current aoa-agents Titan identity and gate state, aoa-sdk runtime state, any owner-local session receipt, and operator review evidence.
